zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert De Mablethorpe於1293年出生在英國林可爾史爾馬波索普時，他的父親Owen De Mablethorpe29歲，母親Beatrice27歲。他於1302年與Jane FitzWilliam在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1359年登記服兵役。他去世於1332年1月21日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾馬波索普享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert De Mablethorpe于1293年出生在英国林可爾史爾馬波索普时，他的父亲Owen De Mablethorpe29岁，母亲Beatrice27岁。他于1302年与Jane FitzWilliam在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1359年登记服兵役。他去世于1332年1月21日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾馬波索普享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mablethorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Mablethorpe (Lincs), which is recorded as Malbertorp in 1086, Maubertorp in 1176.

variants.name: Mapletoft
meanings: English: (i) of uncertain origin; perhaps a locative name from an unidentified place, presumably in or near Lincs. (ii) alternatively, perhaps, a variant of Maplethorpe , modified as if containing Middle English toft ‘building plot’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert De Mablethorpe was born in 1293, in Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Owen De Mablethorpe, was 29 and his mother, Beatrice, was 27. He married Jane FitzWilliam in 1302, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1359. He died on 21 January 1332, in Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert De Mablethorpe est né en 1293, à Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Owen De Mablethorpe, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Beatrice, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Jane FitzWilliam en 1302, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1359. Il est décédé le 21 janvier 1332, à Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert De Mablethorpe 1293 in Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Owen De Mablethorpe 29 und seine Mutter Beatrice 27. Er hat 1302 in England, United Kingdom Jane FitzWilliam geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1359 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 21. Januar 1332 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert De Mablethorpe è nato il nel 1293 nel Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Owen De Mablethorpe, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Jane FitzWilliam nel 1302, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1359. Morì il 21 gennaio 1332, nel Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert De Mablethorpeが1293年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアマブレソルペで生まれた時，父Owen De Mablethorpeは29歳，母Beatriceは27歳であった。1302年にイギリスイギリスでJane FitzWilliamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1359年に兵役登録をした。彼は1332年1月21日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアマブレソルペで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert De Mablethorpe(이)가 1293년 영국 링코실르 마블레소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Owen De Mablethorpe(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1302년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Jane FitzWilliam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1359년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1332년 1월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 마블레소에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert De Mablethorpe nasceu em 1293, em Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Owen De Mablethorpe, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane FitzWilliam em 1302, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1359. Ele faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1332, em Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert De Mablethorpe родился в 1293 г. в местности маблетаурп, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Owen De Mablethorpe было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane FitzWilliam в 1302 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1359 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 21 января 1332 г. в местности маблетаурп, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert De Mablethorpe nació en 1293, en Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Owen De Mablethorpe, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Beatrice, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Jane FitzWilliam en 1302, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1359. Murió el 21 de enero de 1332, en Mablethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años.
